products.name: Aura Soundbar Pro
products.description: Elegant spatial audio system featuring patented high-fidelity sonic waves, dynamic acoustic profiling, and rich walnut wood grills.

products.name: Nova Light Canvas
products.description: Intelligent ambient modular LED light sheets that morph color palettes and shift luminances in synchronization with your environment's kinetic vibes.

products.name: Zenith Ergo Split Keyboard
products.description: Ergonomic mechanical split-layout keyboard crafted in aviation-grade dark gray aluminum with hot-swappable clicky gold switches and customizable ortholinear layout.

products.name: Nebula Desk Mat (Extra Large)
products.description: Premium smooth mouse mat woven with low-friction silver-thread microtexture, non-slip rubber padding, and high-fidelity deep space print.

products.name: Chronos Light Kinetic Watch
products.description: A timeless kinetic piece charged entirely by ambient light, encased in premium brushed metal, sapphire crystal glass, and paired with structured leather strap.

products.name: EcoThread Commuter Pack
products.description: Weatherproof modular commuter daypack constructed 100% from ocean-bound recycled plastic fibers with magnetic utility fixtures and custom laptop pocket.

orders.address: Nairobi County, Kilimani, Kilimani Road, Crescent Court Block C, Room 4
